首页 / 课程定价计算器

课程定价计算器

找到实现收入目标的最佳课程定价，考虑平台费用。对比不同价位下的收入。

🎭 场景预设

如何使用此工具

1
输入你希望从课程中获得的月收入。
2
估算每月有多少学生会购买你的课程。
3
输入平台费用百分比（Teachable、Gumroad、Udemy等）。
4
查看扣除平台费用后你需要设置的最优价格。
5
查看定价层级指导评估。
6
向下滚动对比9个不同价格点的收入结果。
7
tools.solopreneur-course-pricing-calculator.how_to_use.6

常见问题

平台费用一般是多少？

Udemy根据学生来源收取3-63%不等。Teachable和Podia付费方案收5-10%。Gumroad收10%。自建方案如WordPress+WooCommerce无平台费，但需支付2.9%+0.30美元/笔的支付处理费。

课程每月多少购买人数比较现实？

拥有中等邮件列表（2000-5000订阅者）和一些有机流量的课程，发布时可期望月销20-50单，之后降至月销10-30单。拥有大受众（5万+订阅者或高流量博客）的课程可维持月销100-500单。

该提供分期付款吗？

应该。提供3期分期付款并设置更高总价（如一次性149美元或3×69=207美元），可提高20-40%的转化率并提升每位学生的总收入。分期也吸引了付不起全款的买家。

如何判断课程定价是否太高？

如果你的销售页转化率低于0.5%，可能定价对受众来说太高了，或者销售页需要改进。如果转化率高于3%，你可能定价偏低了。用不同价格点做A/B测试找到最佳区间。

课程发布的最佳方式是什么？

使用发布序列：用免费内容建立期待感，限时开放报名（7-14天），提供早鸟折扣。发布后关闭报名以制造紧迫感。很多创作者在发布周期间就获得了全年课程收入的50-70%。

结果

复制全部
示例

🎓 Course Pricing Calculator

💰 Revenue Projection: ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ • Target Monthly Income: $5,000 • Est. Buyers/Month: 50 • Platform Fee: 10.0% • Optimal Price: $111.11/student • Breakeven Price: $100.00/student (before fees) • Gross Revenue: $5,556/mo • Platform Takes: $556/mo • Net Revenue: $5,000/mo • Annual Net Revenue: $60,000/yr ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 📐 Pricing Metrics: • Price per Student: $111.11 • $/Hour of Creation: $125/hr ($125.00 earned per hour invested) • Estimated LTV (with upsell): $166.67 (1.5x base price) • Gross Margin: 90.0% (after platform fee) • Annual Course Earnings: $60,000/yr (at this monthly run rate) • Payback to course creator: ~0.1 months to recoup creation effort ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🩺 Pricing Health: ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ • 🟠 $125/hr-of-effort is low — underpriced or under-selling. • 🟡 Price point $$111.11 is mid-market — sweet spot for volume. • 🟢 50 buyers/mo is a solid funnel size. • 🟡 Platform fee 10.0% is standard (Teachable, Thinkific). 🎯 Launch Revenue: ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ • Email list needed: ~2,500 (at 2% conversion) • Launch revenue (30% off): $3,889 • Sustained monthly: $5,000/mo • 12-month projection: $60,000/yr • With upsell to cohort: $130,000/yr potential ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ⚖️ Self-Study vs Cohort Break-Even: ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ • Self-study annual: $60,000/yr • Cohort premium: $388.89/student (3.5x self-study) • Cohort annual (30% take): $70,000/yr • Cohort takes more time: +10-15 hrs/wk of your time • Break-even: cohort needs 30% take rate to beat self-study ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🔄 What-If Scenarios: ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ • Raise price 30%: $144.44/student ($6,500/mo net) • Double buyers (2x reach): $10,000/mo ($120,000/yr) • Self-host (0% fee): $5,556/mo gross (saves $556/mo) • Add cohort tier (30% take): +$70,000/yr • Bundle w/ coaching: +$6,667/yr (20% take coaching upsell) At $29 price: 1,305/mo net (15,660/yr) at 50 buyers/mo At $49 price: 2,205/mo net (26,460/yr) at 50 buyers/mo At $97 price: 4,365/mo net (52,380/yr) at 50 buyers/mo At $147 price: 6,615/mo net (79,380/yr) at 50 buyers/mo At $197 price: 8,865/mo net (106,380/yr) at 50 buyers/mo At $297 price: 13,365/mo net (160,380/yr) at 50 buyers/mo At $497 price: 22,365/mo net (268,380/yr) at 50 buyers/mo At $697 price: 31,365/mo net
